facebook.caption:
5.0 stars. 73 reviews. Zero complaints.

Nala Spa sits inside Chợ đêm Phú Quốc and somehow holds a perfect score. After a full day of beaches and bikes, this is where you end up. Book the slot, walk in, walk out a different person.

Kiot 40, 42 Đ. Lê Lợi. Right in the night market. No excuse to skip it.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Inside a night market spa with a perfect 5.0. Watch the hands go to work on those beach-day shoulders. Nala Spa, Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. You need this.
